description_long: This is a commercial passenger airplane with a sleek, elongated fuselage painted primarily white with a dark blue tail and red, blue, and white stripes, bearing the Aeroflot livery. The aircraft features low-mounted, swept-back wings and two rear-mounted jet engines positioned on either side of the tail section. The tail is a T-tail configuration, with the horizontal stabilizer mounted atop the vertical fin. The cockpit is located at the very front of the fuselage, with a row of passenger windows running along the sides. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with the main gear under the wings and a nose gear beneath the cockpit. The overall design is streamlined for efficient flight, with smooth surfaces and minimal protrusions.
description: A sleek, white commercial passenger airplane with a T-tail, low-swept wings, and rear-mounted jet engines in Aeroflot livery.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, low-mounted swept wings, and the Aeroflot livery with visible passenger windows.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the T-tail, twin rear-mounted engines, and the full wingspan.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the tail and engine placement.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the wing sweep, engine nacelles, and the overall planform of the airplane.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back configuration with moderate dihedral and no visible winglets.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, typical of commercial passenger aircraft.
